# UNICASH

> UNICASH is a premium Australian membership rewards platform. Members scan eligible
> receipts to earn Points and Fuel Rewards, then redeem Points for gift cards. A paid
> Membership unlocks additional benefits. Operated by UNICASH Pty Ltd (ABN 90 693 062 538),
> Perth, Western Australia.

## What UNICASH offers
- Membership: a recurring subscription with member benefits.
- Points: the core reward unit, earned by scanning eligible receipts.
- Fuel Rewards: earned on eligible fuel receipts.
- Point Boosters: one-time purchases for extra Points.
- Redeem Gift Cards: exchange Points for gift cards.
- Scan Receipts: upload receipts to earn Points and Fuel Rewards.
- Bonus Draws and Major Draws: member draws entered with Points.

## Key pages
- Home: https://unicash.com.au/
- About: https://unicash.com.au/about
- How scanning works: https://unicash.com.au/scan-receipts
- Gift cards: https://unicash.com.au/rewards/gift-cards
- Point Boosters: https://unicash.com.au/point-boosters
- Bonus Draws: https://unicash.com.au/giveaways
- FAQ: https://unicash.com.au/faq
- Contact: https://unicash.com.au/contact

## Notes
- UNICASH is a rewards and benefits platform, not a gambling product.
- Pricing is in AUD. Terms: https://unicash.com.au/terms · Privacy: https://unicash.com.au/privacy
